header.title: Submit a Complaint
header.description: Tell us what happened, where it happened, and we will route it to the right team.

placeholders.title: e.g., Water seepage at corridor ceiling
placeholders.description: Please provide as much detail as possible...
placeholders.location: e.g., Tower B, Level 12 lift lobby

uploadCard.title: ATTACHMENTS
uploadCard.helperText: Attach photos, videos, or screenshots to help management assess the case faster

messages.errorDescription: The complaint mock request failed. Replace the service when the real complaint API is ready.
messages.successDescription: Your complaint has been submitted to the management team and a case reference will be generated.
